references.text: Nickrent, DL, V Malécot, R Vidal-Russell & JP Der. 2010. A revised classification of Santalales. Taxon 59: 538-558
Sleumer, H. 1984. Olacaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 1-29

species.citation: Roxb. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 1 (1820) 169 ; Hort. Beng. (1814) 5, nom. inval., nom. nud.; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 185; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 117; Sleumer, Blumea 26 (1980) 156; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1984) 8.
species.distribution: Andaman Isls, Borneo, India, Java, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, New Guinea, Nicobar Isls, Pacific Ocean, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Sumatra, Taiwan, Thailand. BASILAN, BOHOL, CEBU, GUIMARAS, LUZON: Abra, Bataan, Batangas, Ilocos Norte, Ilocos Sur, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Pangasinan, Rizal, Tarlac, Zambales, MARINDUQUE, MINDANAO: Davao, Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga, MINDORO, PALAUI (photos), PALAWAN, ROMBLON, SEMIRARA, SULU ARCHIPELAGO, TAMLANGON, TAWI-TAWI.
species.notes: Primary, also often on secondary forest, dry brushwood. 0-900m.
